document.source_title: Mahela Jayawardene reacts to MI’s elimination from IPL 2026 Playoffs race: ‘Not good enough’

claims.claim_text: MI were not good enough this season.
claims.evidence_text: Mahela Jayawardene admitted the five-time champions were 'not good enough' this season after their playoff hopes ended.
Jayawardene said injuries and niggles disrupted the side throughout the campaign and forced several changes to the playing XI.

entities.name: Mumbai Indians
entities.description: A professional cricket team based in Mumbai.
entities.evidence_text: Mumbai Indians (MI) head coach Mahela Jayawardene admitted the five-time champions were 'not good enough' this season.

entities.name: Krunal Pandya
entities.description: An Indian cricketer who played for RCB and MI.
entities.evidence_text: Jayawardene reserved special praise for Krunal Pandya, whose composed knock helped RCB complete the chase.

entities.name: Royal Challengers Bengaluru
entities.description: A professional cricket team based in Bengaluru.
entities.evidence_text: MI's playoff hopes ended with a narrow two-wicket defeat to Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

entities.name: Punjab Kings
entities.description: A professional cricket team based in Mohali.
entities.evidence_text: MI next take on Punjab Kings in Dharamsala on Thursday.

events.event: MI eliminated from IPL 2026 Playoffs race
events.evidence_text: MI's playoff hopes ended with a narrow two-wicket defeat to Royal Challengers Bengaluru in Raipur.
